body.lastId: REQUIRED - 0 for the whole feed, or a prior newestId for messages since then. Omitting it returns {success:false} with error 'missingParameter'.
body.filters[]: OPTIONAL - omit for the full feed
body.startDate: OPTIONAL - omit for the default recent window

success.message_object: {id, requestId, auditId, stateChange, ts, isRead, firmOnly, userType, userId, notes, commentId, isMine, files[], requestData}
success.file_object_in_message: {id (=fId), fmsId, requestId, origFileName, fileSize, ts, isDeleted, ...}

errors.missingParameter: lastId (or another required field) was not sent
errors.throttleCheck: called too rapidly - space calls out

usage: An activity feed. NOT a dependable whole-engagement source - it can return 0 messages even when the binder holds files, and it throttles under rapid calls. For a reliable 'what's new' use map_binder_js (a free DOM scrape) and the per-engagement index instead.
script: suralink.py :: load_ian_js  |  flatten with suralink-sync sync.py :: ian_files
validated: 2026-05-23, audit 2774111 - loadIAN requires lastId; with lastId=0 it returns {success:true}
